name: Kreatopitakia (Baked Savory Pastries w/ Seasoned Meat)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Lean ground lamb or beef
1 tablespoon Chopped fresh mint or dill
recipeInstructions:
Note: Suggested cheeses for this recipe are Greek kefalotyri or Parmesan.
1. Heat the 3 tablespoons butter or margarine and cook the shallots until soft.
2. Add the meat and mash with a fork over medium heat until the color changes.
3. Add the wine and simmer for a few minutes.
4. Stir in the herbs, tomato sauce; season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Simmer for 20 minutes. Cool.
6. Add the cheese and egg, and if the mixture is very liquid, stir in the bread crumbs immediately before stuffing.
7. Unroll filo sheets flat and cut into thirds (3 x 11 inches).
8. Place filo sheets on waxed paper covered with a damp towel.
9. Butter each filo sheet using a pastry brush and the melted butter.
10. Place 1 teaspoon of the meat filling 1 inch from the end nearest you.
11. Fold the filo back over the filling so the bottom edge meets the left edge, forming a right angle.
12. Continue folding at right angles to make the triangular shape.
13. Place on baking sheets and keep covered until all are ready to bake.
14. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees) for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden and crisp, turning once. Serve hot.
